creator: peter.larsen@larsendata.dk
text:
MOVED: security/openssl 2019-12-31 Has expired: OpenSSL 1.0.2 is End-of-Life 2019-12-31 at which  time this port will update to 1.1.1 branch

this is breaking, and have been breaking buildservers most of the day so far, might be a good idea to update the port to 1.1.1 asap as mentioned
